calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun in Propria Persona.

Mr. Kun stated that this is a petition for fees regarding preparation. The Court reminded Mr. Kun that file stamped courtesy copies are required and that the examiner did not receive any on this case. Mr. Kun stated that he was not sure which documents the examiner was requesting, that he tried to obtain the civil file to provide to the examiner as he was not sure what she wanted. The Court asked if this is what the 2.5 hours of compensation is for. Mr. Kun stated that he was hired to prepare the special needs trust, that the civil case had not been settled, that there was no money in the trust, that he contacted the insurance company to provide the funds, that Judge Wiss issued an Order to Show Cause and the case was subsequently settled and that he spent a lot of time settling the case. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for and with Maria Vazquez. Viviana Vasquez (Daughter of Maria) also present.

Mr. Kun presented a copy of a bank statement showing a balance of $20,000.00. Ms. Vasquez stated that $6,000.00 was in a seperate savings account. The Court is satisfied with the amounts held in the accounts upon review of the Order Approving Compromise filed May 16, 2011 in case number CGC-10-503761. Mr. Kun is to file a declaration with regard to the $6,000.00 savings account being held in the name of the Special Needs Trust. The Court reminded the Parties that status of the accounting is set for February 8, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
